attributes.additional_details: Many security operatives and door supervisors face threats and physical danger everyday at work whilst receiving minimum wage
attributes.background: Look into pay rises for SIA operatives as they are in frontline jobs facing danger everyday

rejection.details:
The following petition calls for a review of working conditions - including pay - for people working in the security industry: 

Conduct a review of working conditions in the security industry
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762832
